title: Time & Wind
description: Control length of day and night!
body:
Time & wind is a minecraft mod that allows altering of night or/and day duration. Read below for setup instructions.

Fabric versions depend on [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

Required both on client and server


If you encounter any issues please report them on issue tracker

[Detailed setup guide(Recommended)](https://github.com/CmdrJane/time-and-wind/wiki/Setting-Up)

Setup:

While in game use /taw set-cycle-length <dimension> <day length> <night length>

For example /taw set-cycle-length minecraft:overworld 24000 9000 will set day duration to 24000 ticks and night to 9000 ticks for dimension overworld

20 ticks = 1 second, 1200 ticks = 1 minute, 72 000 ticks = 1 hour

If you want to remove configuration for world use /taw remove-cycle-entry <dimension>

World id can be obtained using /taw get-current-world-id, this command will print id of current world you are in

You can also navigate to config/time-and-wind/time-data.json and make changes there.

After all changes made use /taw reload to apply them

#### Seizure warning: Setting values less than 12000 may cause epilepsy or other unwanted side effects!

Note: Custom configuration for dimensions that have fixed time will obviously not work. In Vanilla you can only configure custom time length for overworld, but if you have modded dimensions without fixed time you will be able to set custom time length for them and it will work.


This mod also patches getSkyAngle method in order to make day and night length even since in vanilla day is a little bit longer than night. This can be disabled in config file.


How does mod works:

Using mixin mod redirects call to setTime in tickTime method passing control to custom ticker method. That means you don't need to set game rule doDayLightCycle to false for this mod to function.

For further information you can check [this package on github](https://github.com/CmdrJane/time-and-wind/tree/1.19.4/src/main/java/ru/aiefu/timeandwindct/tickers)

[Video Demonstration](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jZxkBkoJL1o&embeds_referring_euri=https%3A%2F%2Flegacy.curseforge.com%2F&source_ve_path=Mjg2NjY&feature=emb_logo)

 
Modpack permission: Very yes
